mapper.insert:
insert into announcement
announcement_id,
title,
image_url,
publish_time,
is_top,
content,
#{announcement_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publish_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{is_top,jdbcType=BIT},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update announcement
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image_url = #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publish_time = #{publish_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_top = #{is_top,jdbcType=BIT},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where announcement_id = #{announcement_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update announcement set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_url = #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_time = #{publish_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_top = #{is_top,jdbcType=BIT}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where announcement_id = #{announcement_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
,
from announcement order by is_top desc, publish_time desc

select
,
from announcement where is_top = 1 order by publish_time desc

select
,
from announcement where is_top = 0 or is_top is null order by publish_time desc
